goal_summary: Use a lighter, question-led sequence to recover from the clustered outreach on May 5, incorporate the provided asset into SMS outreach, and get Maya to choose a short phone call with Andre if there is real interest.
lead_state_summary: Trailhead Catering Guild — Maya Esposito is a new potential lead created on May 2. On May 5, Andre sent three outbound SMS messages in the same day at 03:05, 13:39, and 14:12, plus an outgoing email at 14:12 with subject "contextual_follow_up." There is no recorded inbound reply, no workflow enrollment, and no event details yet. The immediate need is to slow the cadence, keep the next touch simple, and use one easy question to open a conversation while incorporating the provided asset into text outreach.

days.objective: Create a clean pause after the May 5 cluster, verify the thread, and prepare an SMS that uses the supplied asset without adding pressure.

required_actions.intent: Audit the full May 5 thread and confirm there was no missed inbound, opt-out language, or delivery issue before any new outreach resumes.
required_actions.draft_seed: Review the 03:05, 13:39, and 14:12 SMS plus the 14:12 email. Confirm no reply from Maya, no unsubscribe language, and no internal notes that change tomorrow's approach.

required_actions.intent: Queue a single SMS for tomorrow that includes the provided asset and one discovery question.
required_actions.draft_seed: Prepare SMS with asset reference {ASSET:b6bc403f-84f8-46f7-ba81-99cde796f38f}. Keep copy short: Maya, sharing this in case it helps. When you looked into catering for Trailhead Catering Guild, what were you hoping to figure out first?

days.send_window: No outbound today; internal review and queue prep during business hours.

days.objective: Re-open with a softer SMS that includes the supplied asset and asks one easy discovery question.

required_actions.intent: Send a low-pressure text with the provided asset and ask what Maya wanted to understand first.

days.objective: If still no reply, use email to lower pressure and clarify whether there is an active need worth a short call.

required_actions.intent: Send a brief reset email that asks whether this is active planning or early research.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Quick question

Maya — wanted to ask one simple thing: are you actively planning something right now, or was this more early research?

If it is active, Andre can do a quick 10-minute call and help you sort through options.

days.send_window: Email between 8:00 AM and 11:00 AM lead-local time.

days.objective: Review for any reply and be ready to convert interest into a scheduled call.

required_actions.intent: Review thread and, if Maya has replied with any event details or curiosity, send a personalized response aimed at booking a phone call.
required_actions.draft_seed: If Maya replies, answer her exact point first, then ask: Would it be easier to talk this through for 10 minutes with Andre?

days.send_window: Internal review between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM lead-local time.

days.objective: Use one final SMS nudge with the asset again only if appropriate, making it easy to say yes, no, or not now.

days.objective: Pause live outreach and prepare the scheduling response if Maya engages.

required_actions.intent: Monitor for response and prepare a short scheduling reply if Maya shows interest.
required_actions.draft_seed: If Maya responds positively, reply with two simple call options and ask which works better for her.

days.objective: Send a final email that gives Maya a low-friction way to either book a call or decline.

required_actions.intent: Close the loop respectfully and offer a short phone conversation if timing is real.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Should I keep this open?

Maya — I do not want to crowd you.

If catering is on the table, the easiest next step is a short call with Andre to understand date, headcount, and what you are trying to make happen.

If now is not the time, I can close the loop on my end.
